title: 150 pcs Fake Crushed Ice Rocks Fake Diamonds Acrylic Crystals Gemstones for Vase Fillers Wedding Table Decoration Home and Party Decoration Table Scatter Crystals (Gold/Transparent)
features: 150 pcs High Quality Ice Rocks made from Plastic.
75 Transparent Ice Rocks and 75 Gold Coloured Ice Rocks in each Bag to give you a Beautiful Choice to Design your Decoration.
To give you a good choice we have included 2 sizes of Rock in each bag: 25 x 18mm and 14 x 11mm. There are 75 Rocks of each size/bag

Catching the Light beautifully these Fake Crushed Ice Rocks make ideal Vase Fillers and Table Decoration for so many Occasions: Ideal for Weddings, Baby Showers, Baby Namings, Engagement Parties, Sweet 16's, 21st Birthday Parties, Dinner Parties, Interior Design......Any occasion when a Beautiful Effect is Wanted. They are for Display Purposes and NOT to be used in Drinks
Other Sets in different Colours and other Matching Co-ordinating Decoration available. Not for use by Children Under 5 and should only be used under adult supervision
description: Product Description High Quality Ice Rocks 75 Transparent Ice Rocks and 75 Gold Coloured Ice Rocks in each Bag to give you a Beautiful Choice to Design your Decoration. Transparent and Coloured they do not smell and are made of good quality plastic. These are ideal for so many uses. Makes a Stunning Display These Fake Crushed Ice Rocks make ideal Vase Fillers and Table Decoration for so many Occasions: Ideal for Weddings, Baby Showers, Baby Namings, Engagement Parties, Sweet 16's, 21st Birthday Parties, Dinner Parties, Interior Design......Any occasion when a Beautiful Effect is Wanted. Catching the light Beautifully Ideal to decorate your table display. 2 sizes in each mix Our bags contain 2 Sizes and 2 Colours to give you Choice and allowing a Beautiful Effect to be achieved. The size may appear larger on the screen so please check the size before purchase. The colours are as in the photo but can vary according to the colour setting of each computer monitor. Other Colour Sets Available from Lusso Lia Note: These are Fake Ice Rocks and they do Not Float and do Not freeze. They are for DISPLAY PURPOSES ONLY and NOT to be used in Drinks. Warning: Not suitable for children under 14 years. For use under adult supervision
